entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of mathematical language
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Use rates and variations in different contexts
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concepts of rates and variations
teaching_learning_activities: Exploration: Organise students in manageable groups and guide them to explore real-life problems related to the concepts of rates and variations
entries.assessment: Concepts of rates and variations are well described
entries.references: Mathematics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of mathematical language
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Use rates and variations in different contexts
entries.learning_activity: (b) Solve problems on rates and variations
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: In manageable groups, guide students to solve problems involving rates and variations
entries.assessment: Problems on rates and variations are correctly solved
entries.references: Mathematics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts in geometry and algebra
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Use geometry, approximations, relations and functions in various contexts
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concepts of geometry (similarities and congruence)
teaching_learning_activities: Exploration: Guide the students to explore shapes and identify congruent and similar figures through direct comparison

Group discussion: In manageable groups, guide students to discuss the concepts of similarities and congruences through hands-on activities that involve physical manipulatives, such as pattern blocks, tangrams or geoboards
entries.assessment: Concepts of geometry are well described
entries.references: Mathematics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts in geometry and algebra
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Use geometry, approximations, relations and functions in various contexts
entries.learning_activity: (b) Recognize properties of similar triangles
teaching_learning_activities: Visual representation: Guide students to use pictures, charts, diagrams, and models to recognize properties of similar triangles
Jigsaw: Guide students to constructs and manipulate similar and congruent triangles and associate them to real-life applications
Exploration: Guide students to connect similar triangles to real world applications
entries.assessment: Properties of similar triangles are clearly recognized
entries.references: Mathematics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts in geometry and algebra
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Use algebra and matrices in problem solving
entries.learning_activity: (a) Explore the basic tenets of algebra (binary operations, quadratic expressions and equations, radicals, exponents, and logarithms)
teaching_learning_activities: Jigsaw: Organise students in manageable groups to discuss the concepts of algebra (binary operations, quadratic expressions and equations, radicals, exponents, and logarithms)
Graphical methods: Organize students in manageable groups and guide them to use graphs to solve quadratic equations
Use of technology: Guide students to use technology such as Excel, GeoGebra, Microsoft Mathematics, and MATLAB to solve quadratic equations
Problems solving: In manageable groups, guide students to apply binary operations to simplify quadratic expressions
entries.assessment: Basic tenets of algebra are explored correctly
resources: Mathematical software such as GeoGebra, MATLAB, Maple, Mathematica, graphing calculators
entries.references: Mathematics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.assessment: Quadratic equations are solved correctly

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts in geometry and algebra
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Use algebra and matrices in problem solving
entries.learning_activity: (c) Identify and use laws of exponents involving positive, negative, and zero exponents (multiplication law, division law, power law, and zero index)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: In manageable groups, guide students to identify and discuss multiplication law, division law, power law, and zero index
Problem solving: Guide students to discuss and use laws of exponents involving positive, negative, and zero exponents to simplify and solve exponential equations
entries.assessment: Laws of exponents are clearly identified and used correctly
entries.references: Mathematics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts in geometry and algebra
entries.specific_competence: 2.3 Use sets, sequences and series in problem solving
entries.learning_activity: (a) Explore the basic tenets of sets (types of sets, subsets, operation with sets, and Venn diagrams of two sets)
teaching_learning_activities: Exploration: Organise students in manageable groups to explore the concepts of sets, subsets, operations of sets, and Venn diagram of two sets
Jigsaw: Organise students in manageable groups to illustrate concepts of sets, subsets, operations of sets, and Venn diagrams of two sets using real-life examples
entries.assessment: Basic tenets of sets are clearly explored
entries.references: Mathematics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts in geometry and algebra
entries.specific_competence: 2.3 Use sets, sequences and series in problem solving
entries.learning_activity: (b) Distinguish among different types of sets (universal set, equal sets, empty/null set, finite and infinite sets, equivalent sets, and disjoint sets)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Organise students in manageable groups to discuss the different types of sets
entries.assessment: Different types of sets are clearly distinguished
entries.references: Mathematics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Organise students in manageable groups to compare subsets and universal sets
entries.assessment: Sets are clearly compared
entries.references: Mathematics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.specific_competence: 2.3 Use sets, sequences and series in problem solving
entries.learning_activity: (e) Represent two sets in a Venn diagram

entries.assessment: Sets in a Venn diagram are correctly represented

entries.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts in coordinate geometry, trigonometry, circles, vectors, probability, and statistics
